english translation text: Paikan baras rahai hain taboot par Hasan kaiArrows are being pelted at the coffin of Imam Hasan (a.s.)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Paikan baras rahai hain taboot par Hasan kaiUmmat mitarahi hai, aasar Panjatan kai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
ARROWS ARE BEING PELTED AT THE COFFIN OF IMAM HASAN (a.s),
THE UMMAH OF THE PROPHET (saw) IS REMOVING ALL TRACES OF THE PANJATAN

urdu transliteration text:
Baba ke dil ke tukreh, tuneh ghineh bahatarTukray hazar hongay, Qasim tere badan kai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O QASIM! YOUR FATHERS’ LIVER WAS IN PIECES,
BUT QASIM YOUR ENTIRE BODY WILL BE TORN INTO INNUMERABLE PIECES
YOU ARE THROWING UP BLOOD, MAY I BE SACRIFICED FOR YOU

urdu transliteration text:
Taboot say lipat kar, Qasim pukarah baba,Anso Akhi ke dekho, nohay suno bahen ke
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
QASIM HELD ON TO THE COFFIN AND CRIED “O FATHER!”
O ZAINAB! SEE THE TEARS OF YOUR BROTHER, AND O BROTHER! LISTEN TO YOUR SISTER LAMENTING
